commentary: Big news for Ward Taxi & Car Service: we are expanding our airport queue service at Miami International. Faster pickups, more vans, same reliable team that has served Allapattah since 2000. Book a ride at wardtaxi.com.

We are hiring part-time drivers at Ward Taxi & Car Service here in Miami. Clean driving record required, CDL a plus, and a friendly attitude is a must. Flexible shifts that work around your schedule. DM me or call the yard in Allapattah.

Ward Taxi & Car Service is pursuing AHCA non-emergency medical transport licensing so we can safely get patients to and from appointments across Miami. Reliable, courteous, on-time rides for our neighbors who need them most. More updates soon.

Preventive maintenance is not something you bolt on at the end. Sharing the pre-trip inspection checklist we run on every Camry and Pacifica in the Ward Taxi fleet before it leaves the yard. Keeps our riders safe and our vehicles on the road.

New dispatch routine is up and running: we reworked our hotel and airport pickup scheduling so no rider waits without a car. Took the team a week to get right, and the on-time numbers already look great.

Congratulations to our fleet manager Frank Morrison on 15 years with Ward Taxi & Car Service. Grateful for a team that shows up for our riders and our Allapattah community. As a deacon at Grace Community Church, I am reminded every day that service is what it is all about.
